departments.name: Human Resources
departments.description: HR management, recruitment and employee relations.
departments.head: Adeline Zeka

departments.name: Operations
departments.description: Structural department that client projects branch off.

positions.title: CEO
positions.description: Sets the strategic direction, oversees all operations and departments, manages stakeholder relationships, and drives business growth. Accountable for overall company performance and culture.

positions.title: HR Manager
positions.description: Leads the HR department, designs and implements HR policies, oversees recruitment, employee relations, compensation and benefits. Ensures legal compliance and fosters a positive workplace culture.

positions.title: HR Officer
positions.description: Handles day-to-day HR operations including recruitment, onboarding, employee records management, leave administration, and employee inquiries. Supports the HR Manager in policy implementation.

positions.title: Head of Learning & Development
positions.description: Designs and manages the company's training strategy, identifies skill gaps, develops learning programs, coordinates with project teams on onboarding needs, and measures training effectiveness.

positions.title: L&D Officer
positions.description: Delivers training sessions, creates learning materials, manages the LMS platform, tracks employee progress and certifications, and supports onboarding for new hires.

positions.title: Project Leader (E.ON)
positions.description: Manages daily operations of the E.ON energy client project, supervises team performance, ensures SLA compliance, handles escalations, and reports to senior leadership on KPIs.

positions.title: Senior Project Leader (E.ON)
positions.description: Oversees the E.ON project at a strategic level, manages client relationships, coordinates with multiple team leaders, drives process improvements, and ensures quality standards are met.

positions.title: Training & Quality Coordinator (E.ON)
positions.description: Develops training materials specific to E.ON processes, conducts quality audits, monitors call quality, provides coaching and feedback, and ensures compliance with client requirements.

positions.title: Project Leader (Freenet)
positions.description: Manages daily operations of the Freenet telecommunications client project, supervises agents, monitors performance metrics, and handles client reporting.

positions.title: Senior Project Leader (Freenet)
positions.description: Strategic oversight of the Freenet project, manages client expectations, coordinates team scheduling, drives efficiency improvements, and handles complex escalations.

positions.title: Team Leader (Freenet)
positions.description: Directly supervises a team of agents on the Freenet project, handles real-time queue management, provides coaching, and ensures daily targets are met.

positions.title: Emergency Team Lead (Flixbus)
positions.description: Handles urgent and emergency situations for the Flixbus mobility project, coordinates rapid response, manages crisis communication, and ensures passenger safety protocols are followed.

positions.title: Project Leader (Flixbus)
positions.description: Manages daily operations of the Flixbus mobility client project, oversees team performance, ensures service quality, and coordinates with client contacts.

positions.title: Senior Team Leader (Flixbus)
positions.description: Oversees multiple teams on the Flixbus project, manages scheduling and workforce planning, drives performance improvements, and serves as the primary operational contact.

positions.title: Team Leader (Flixbus)
positions.description: Supervises a team of agents handling Flixbus customer inquiries, manages shift operations, provides real-time support, and conducts performance reviews.

standards.description: International standard for quality management systems (QMS). It provides a framework for organizations to ensure consistent quality in their products and services, meet customer and regulatory requirements, and continuously improve processes. Applicable to any organization regardless of size or industry.

International standard for information security management systems (ISMS). It specifies requirements for establishing, implementing, maintaining, and continually improving information security. Covers risk assessment, security controls, access management, incident response, and business continuity planning.

International standard for occupational health and safety management systems. It provides a framework to prevent work-related injuries and illness, improve workplace safety, and reduce risks. Covers hazard identification, worker participation, emergency preparedness, and health monitoring.

International standard for environmental management systems (EMS). It helps organizations minimize their environmental impact, comply with applicable laws and regulations, and continually improve environmental performance. Covers waste management, emissions, resource efficiency, and environmental risk assessment.

The General Data Protection Regulation is a European Union regulation on data protection and privacy. It governs how personal data is collected, processed, stored, and shared. Key principles include lawfulness, purpose limitation, data minimization, accuracy, storage limitation, integrity, and accountability. Applies to any organization processing EU residents' data.

standards.full_name: Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard
standards.description: The Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard is an information security standard for organizations handling branded credit cards. It sets requirements for secure networks, cardholder data protection, vulnerability management, access control, monitoring, and security policy. Compliance is mandatory for all entities that store, process, or transmit cardholder data.

department_standards.scope: Articles 6, 9, 13–14 (lawful basis, special categories, employee data privacy notices)
Annex A.6 (Organization of information security), A.7 (HR security), A.9 (Access control), A.12 (Operations security)
